# Microcopy — Astro Recipe

> Lesson 5. Every line of interface text from `wireframes/*.html`, English, after the voice.md pass.
> Date: 2026-07-19
> Line types: **H** heading · **B** button/action · **F** field label/hint · **S** state message (error/empty/loading) · **T** text/content

**User-generated content:** unlike the "Kutok" demo (where a landlord writes the listing), every line in Astro Recipe is either authored by the product or generated by the algorithm (report sections, wow text). The user never writes anything shown to other people (only picks answer options, which aren't rendered back as text). So there's no "user content" column to protect here — everything can be edited.

---

| Primary action | Calculate your natal chart | H |
| Primary action | Birth date, time, and place... Free. | T |
| Primary action | Calculate my chart | B |

---

## Fixed during translation (were flagged in the Ukrainian inventory)

1. **Same action, different words:** "Next" vs "Continue" → unified to **Next** everywhere.
2. **Stale product name:** welcome.html said "Glow Profile" (pre-pivot name) → now names no product at the free step, matches the dictionary.
3. **AI cliché:** results-error.html's "something went wrong" → removed; the heading already states the fact.
4. **Bug, not a voice issue:** report.html had a stray English "one" in Ukrainian text → resolved automatically by the translation.

No lorem ipsum, no leftover placeholders — verified across all 18 files.
